items.claim: Alberto Montes has a significant grappling advantage over McMillan.
items.quote: when I see somebody have that big of an advantage, I think Montes knows he just needs a moment.

items.claim: McMillan has a tendency to duck his head and roll into exchanges while striking.
items.quote: McMillan, just watching him strike, he does like to duck his head and roll in there a little bit.

items.claim: Fatima Klein has a 5-inch height and 6-inch reach advantage over Tabitha Richie.
items.quote: she's coming into this fight five inches taller with a 6-in reach advantage.

items.claim: Fatima Klein is a high-level striker with smooth kickboxing.
items.quote: Klein's a highle striker, too. Her kickboxing smooth.

items.claim: Tabitha Richie relies on grinding opponents into the fence and constant takedown attempts.
items.quote: she's got away from what she's good at. Grinding into the fence, constantly attempting takedowns

items.claim: Fatima Klein is coming into this fight on short notice.
items.quote: She did take the fight on short notice

items.claim: Chase Hooper has suffered back-to-back knockout losses.
items.quote: I don't know how to pick with Chase Hooper after back-to-back KO losses.

items.claim: Chase Hooper's most recent knockout loss occurred 12 weeks ago.
items.quote: He got knocked out [ __ ] 12 weeks ago.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez lacks significant punching power.
items.quote: it's not like Ramirez has a lot of punching power, AJ.
